ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the show (e.g., TV-MA, TV-14) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Content type of the show (e.g., TV Series, Movie) */,
  "show_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the show */,
  "show_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the show's main image */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date the show was first released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., Running, Ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the show was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the show was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the season belongs to */,
  "season_num" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes in the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the season */,
  "season_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the season's main image */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* The date the season was first aired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_num" INTEGER /* Episode number */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the episode in seconds */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the episode */,
  "episode_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the episode's main image */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* The date the episode was first aired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, content manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show in the watchlist */,
  "last_watched_episode" INTEGER /* ID of the last watched episode in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was last updated */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has completed watching the show in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode viewed */,
  "viewed_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was viewed */,
  "viewed_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode viewed in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user started viewing the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user finished viewing the episode */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Size of the screen used for viewing (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "buffering_time" INTEGER /* Total buffering time in seconds during the viewing session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating contains a spoiler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains a spoiler */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
